nodes.label: AI as research accelerator
nodes.label_negative: AI as time-wasting or inefficient tool
nodes.grounding_span: if I am in a rush then having generative AI at my fingertips can accelerate my progress

nodes.label: AI use within corporate compliance boundaries
nodes.label_negative: AI as deviation from best practice
nodes.grounding_span: an LLM will often align whatever I draft with best practice which tends to be useful

nodes.label: AI as one-shot tool requiring minimal iteration
nodes.grounding_span: Most of the time one shot suffices. Occasionally, I have to iterate but I would say that is a rare occurrence

nodes.label: Organizational endorsement of AI use
nodes.label_negative: Organizational caution and uncertainty about AI
nodes.grounding_span: there is often uncertainty about whether actions are endorsed and natural concern regarding the risks of a data incident

nodes.label: AI as friction remover for tedious tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of frustration when it fails
nodes.grounding_span: It really removed the friction and tedium from the process

nodes.label: AI as skill development enabler
nodes.label_negative: Complacency about AI skills leading to being left behind
nodes.grounding_span: I feel that I need to develop skills in this area or I will get left behind

nodes.label: AI as augmenting human role
nodes.label_negative: AI as full replacement of human role
nodes.grounding_span: I think you need a human to deal with other humans, especially in my role

nodes.label: AI adoption in workplace
nodes.label_negative: Current AI adoption as experimental and uncertain
nodes.grounding_span: I think I will use AI a lot more as it becomes more accepted and less experimental

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: align whatever I draft with best practice

nodes.label: Career advancement and relevance
nodes.grounding_span: I will get left behind, especially over the course of a career

nodes.label: Human connection and relationship
nodes.grounding_span: you need a human to deal with other humans

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for appraisal drafting
nodes.grounding_span: AI made me feel particularly satisfied about 6 months ago when I was able to draft my annual appraisal contributions

nodes.label: Hesitation toward AI for data analysis
nodes.grounding_span: AI at work made me frustrated when I attempted to use a ChatGPT integration for data analysis

nodes.label: Proactive concern about AI skills gap
nodes.grounding_span: I am concerned about humans with better AI skills out competing me

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: I think I will use AI a lot more as it becomes more accepted and less experimental

nodes.label: Selective, need-based engagement with AI
nodes.grounding_span: my use tends to be ad hoc

nodes.label: Proactive skill-building through courses and podcasts
nodes.grounding_span: I have taken DeepLearning AI's AI for Everyone course, a Google AI Essentials, and a Google Prompting Essentials
